entry.title: wanted to transfer sales order stock to sub contracting vendor, which movement type and transaction
entry.content:
Hello team

We have activated BFs for enabling sub contracting tab in PO line item, there by help us to choose special stock E from the drop down box provided for special stock. Now could you please help me to find the tcode and movement type for transferring the sales order stock to sub contractor

 

Regards

Joshymon J S

entry.title: Re: How to fetch the data from a page in SAC dashboard fo...
entry.content:
Hi Arun,

Thanks for your response! I'm aware that end users have the option to export data by downloading it. However, my question is from a developer’s perspective — how can I programmatically access or utilize the data that is visible in SAC (SAP Analytics Cloud)?

I’d like to explore ways to enhance or repurpose this data to deliver additional value or improved visualizations for users.

entry.title: Re: How to pass filters in SAP BTP destination REST API integration in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
@PratikShekokar11 Can you explain more what you are looking for and what trouble you are having?

P.S.: This question and answer is a little out of date since you can now use actions in SAP Build Apps, and in the action you can define whatever you want for the $filter property, including using placeholders and passing those when you call the action from with your app.

entry.title: Re: “quota exceeded" error in SAP Build basic trial envir...
entry.content:
Hi Anna and Margit

I'm facing the same issue when trying to create a new Process in the SAP Build trial environment.

I receive the same error about exceeding the permitted quota of 750. I also reached out to SAP Learning Support and received the same response regarding the public hosting limitations. If you or anyone else finds a workaround or solution, I'd be grateful to hear about it!

Best regards, Matheus

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Data Cloud - FAQs
entry.content:
@albertosimeoni - I believe we are talking about two different concepts.

1. SQL on Files: Standalone SAP HANA Cloud Data Lake - Has SQL on Files(File Adapter) capability to enable delta-sharing, and SAP BDC utilizes SAP HANA Data Lake Files as the underlying storage, where data is stored in Delta Tables. This setup allows for SQL queries to be executed directly on the files, leveraging the strong OLAP engine functionalities of HANA Cloud. This approach is beneficial for executing complex queries and analysis authorizations without moving data physically. Also, from QRC 04/2024, SQL on Files has started to support direct read-only access to files stored in an external object store(Amazon S3, Azure DL, and Google Cloud Storage) and supports external Delta Sharing via a dedicated Delta Sharing Adapter.

2. Open protocol delta-sharing: To enable zero-copy, this is exclusively enabled with SAP BDC via the SAP and Databricks partnership. Delta-share is a feature associated with SAP Databricks, which allows for seamless data sharing and integration without physically copying the data. It enables existing Databricks customers to connect their systems to SAP BDC, facilitating data sharing and integration without the need for data replication.

 

Thank you, Jeet

entry.title: SAP Meetup or Stammtisch Barcelona, May 8, 2025 / Call for attendees
entry.content:
Hola

Please take a look here to get details for next SAP Meetup/Stammtisch Barcelona

https://community.sap.com/t5/barcelona-events/sap-meet-up-barcelona-may-8th-2025/ec-p/14090712#M5

Hope to see you next Thursday!

David

entry.title: Re: IFRS 15 - Revenue Recognition
entry.content:
Hi Sanne,

The functionality of IFRS15 can be implemented in Event-Based Revenue Recognition at any stage. If you find that you need to ensure compliance with IFRS15 at a later date, please consult SAP as outlined in SAP Note 2524569. This enables you to adapt your system to meet the necessary compliance requirements seamlessly.

Best regards,

Petr

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch PLUS Luzern, 24. Juni 2025
entry.content:
Liebe SAP Community der Zentralschweiz

Am 24. Juni 2025 findet der nächste SAP Stammtisch PLUS Event in Luzern statt. Wir freuen uns auf möglichst viele Teilnehmende, Networking, gemeinsames Anstossen und Vorträge zu folgenden spannenden Themen:

  • SAP Cloud Application Programming (CAP) 
  • SAP Generative AI  

Anmelden könnt ihr euch wie immer direkt hier in unserer Location Group (siehe Button "Yes" oben rechts) oder unter nachfolgendem Link:

Anmeldung SAP Stammtisch PLUS Luzern

Bis bald!

Euer SAP Community OK in der Zentralschweiz

entry.title: Re: AIF - Application Interface Framework
entry.content: @ChrisThomson No, we can't define multiple RFC connections in single "Define Fixed Values" node to dynamically switch between them during runtime. The "Define Fixed Values" node supports assigning one fixed value per field. may be you can look for the options to choose BRF+ or through middle ware

entry.title: Question about SF ATS adoption in China
entry.content:
Hello,

we have a question.

We are developing the ATS module in SF. Our SuccessFactors data center is based in EU.

We have a question about the adoption in China, and its compliance according to the PIPL , considering that the ATS involves senstive personal data (such as National ID, Financial information etc) and that the regulations for handling such data are stricter than those for customer data

 

Do yo experiences of similiar scenarios - I mean of ATS adopted in china and with a data center based in eu?

 

Thanks in advance for your response

entry.content: I just tried using MDK 24.11.3 and after create-client finished, I opened the .xcworkspace, set my Team and ran Project | Archive to create my Enterprise build.  It compiled, signed and exported as expected for me.

entry.title: Re: Important Notice: Changes in SAP Analytics Cloud Classic Stories & Analytic Applications
entry.content: @GustavoSigrist is an SAP Note for SuccessFactors while this blog post is related to Enterprise SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Re: RAP Managed - Show/Hide standard buttons
entry.content:
READ ENTITIES OF zre_determination IN LOCAL MODE
ENTITY deter
ALL FIELDS
WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )
RESULT DATA(entities).

result = VALUE #( FOR entity IN entities
( %tky = entity-%tky
%update = COND #( WHEN entity-Description IS INITIAL
THEN if_abap_behv=>fc-o-disabled
ELSE if_abap_behv=>fc-o-enabled ) ) ).

entry.title: Re: Using Postman For OData / Netweaver Gateway Testing CRUD Methods
entry.content:
If anyone is hosting a server on a virtual machine, on a local pc, instead of the hostname in the link, use localhost.
Which would look something like:

  • http://localhost:8000/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZABHIODATALEARN_SRV/POHeaderSet

entry.title: Re: I want to get Lead Contacts from Sales Cloud V1 to Em...
entry.content: Is there a way to get unqualified leads from Sales Cloud Version 1 into SAP Emarsys? I think you are giving the standard integration information here. You also give how to get new marketing contacts from Emarsys to SAP Sales Cloud version 1. I am looking to see how to get the (unqualified) lead contacts from SAP Sales Cloud version 1 into SAP Emarsys. Usually, when a lead is qualified, the lead is converted into an Account/Contact (which is standard integration). When the lead is unqualified, it isn't an account or contact yet.

entry.title: SAP Sales and Service Cloud 2505 Release Briefing
entry.content:
Hi Everyone, please see the presentation of the SAP Sales and Service Cloud 2505 release briefing. In this release we have mainly be focussing of further enhancement to the transition tool for V1-V2 Migration support. 

You will also see some enhancements to the intelligent sales add-on. We are also very happy to mention that finally our Groupware Server Side Integration is now also available in Saudi Arabia DC. 

There are also small enhancements to note in SAP Service Cloud core and Agent Desktop. 

Please note that the Release briefing offered for each release is designed to give you consolidated overviews on the key features for a release. These documents are not the sole source of truth about the release. Instead, the on-line help and What’s New information is intended for that purpose. The on-line help documentation becomes available to customers on the RTC or Release to Customer date of each release.

You can find the current help documentation here

entry.title: Re: SAC Adjusting for Rounding Difference
entry.content:
I was able to resolve this using a Break statement in a For Loop.

The code goes something like this:

INTEGER @n = 0

 

DATA([d/Measures] = #Pre) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "Amount", [d/UE_Audit_Trail] = "CALC_PC")
 
DATA([d/Measures] = #Post) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "Amount", [d/UE_Audit_Trail] = "ALLOC_IN")
 
DATA([d/Measures] = #Diff) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = #Pre) - RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = #Post)
 
FOREACH [d/Date]
DATA([d/UE_Audit_Trail] = "ALLOC_IN", [d/Measures] = #Chk) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "Amount", [d/UE_Audit_Trail] = "ALLOC_IN")
IF RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = #Diff, [d/UE_SubItem] = "#") > 0 THEN
@Diff = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = #Diff, [d/UE_SubItem] = "#")
ENDIF
FOREACH.BOOKED [d/Cost_Center], [d/xxx], [d/yyy]
@n = @n + 1
DELETE([d/UE_Audit_Trail] = "ALLOC_IN", [d/Measures] = "Amount")
DATA([d/UE_Audit_Trail] = "#", [d/Measures] = "Amount") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = #Chk, [d/UE_Audit_Trail] = "ALLOC_IN") + @Diff
 
DATA([d/UE_Audit_Trail] = "ALLOC_IN", [d/Measures] = "Amount") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/UE_Audit_Trail] = "#", [d/Measures] = "Amount")
@Diff = 0
IF @n > 1 THEN
BREAK
ENDIF
ENDFOR
@n = 0

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Data Cloud - FAQs
entry.content:
Hello @jeetendrakapase,

thank you it is better and more clear now, this opens a new question:

By reading the link posted I can get this:

- To have delta-share -> a delta-share server is needed.

- HDLF have delta share capabilities as it can communicate via delta-share with HANA Cloud (database).

My conclusion is that HDLF has a delta-share server, is it right?

So what I am thinking is that:

- if "zero-copy" functionality is only enabled for BDC,

- not having "zero-copy" functinoality in HDLF is more a "license limitation" than an architecture limitation. 

can you confirm so or am I mistaken other concepts?

Best regards,

Alberto

entry.title: Re: SAP Sales and Service Cloud 2505 Release Briefing
entry.content: Me neither

entry.title: SAP BTP ABAP Environment - Switch to DigiCert G5 Root Certificate Authority
entry.content:
Current server certificates for the domains of the SAP BTP ABAP Environment (aka "Steampunk") are issued by the DigiCert G2 Root Certificate Authority (CA). Based on current recommendations, SAP is switching to the DigiCert TLS RSA4096 Root G5 CA, see SAP Note 3566727 for more details. This switch applies to the SAP BTP Cloud Foundry Environment, to the SAP BTP ABAP Environment, and to other SAP services. New regions of the SAP BTP ABAP Environment from Q1 2025 are already set up with the DigiCert G5 Root CA. For existing regions of the SAP BTP ABAP Environment, the switch from the DigiCert G2 Root CA to the DigiCert G5 Root CA is currently planned for Q3/2025.

 

Call to Action

Inbound Connections

If you manage trust stores of client applications/services, which connect to your SAP BTP ABAP Environment instance(s), by yourself, then add the DigiCert TLS RSA4096 Root G5 CA to these trust stores to ensure that your applications/services still can connect to the SAP BTP ABAP Environment instance(s) when the new server certificates are used. This applies to all supported protocols.

Since different (external) client applications / services are using different technical implementations for such trust stores, we cannot provide detailed instructions how to configure these trust stores.

Outbound Connections

For outbound connections from your SAP BTP ABAP Environment instances, for example, towards other services in SAP BTP Cloud Foundry environment, please check the trust settings for the DigiCert TLS RSA4096 Root G5 CA via the Maintain Certificate Trust List application. Since some releases, the Automatic Trust List Update feature is enabled and new certificates from the SAP trust list should have been added automatically to the trust store. If the CA is not contained in the list, click on Check for Updates and add the certificate, or add it manually. You can also download it here.

 

References

  • SAP Note 3566727 : Root Certificate Replacement in the SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry Environment
  • Blog Post: SAP BTP Cloud Foundry: Switching to higher security level Root Certificate Authority
  • Blog Post: SAP BTP ABAP Environment – New Root Certificate Authority
  • Github: Trust Store for SAP BTP

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Data Cloud - FAQs
entry.content: @albertosimeoni - SQL on files, SAP HANA Cloud data lake files capabilities are extended to support Direct access (on-the-fly) using SQL on Files to read CSV, Parquet from HDLF, and other external storage like S3, Azure DL, and Google Cloud Storage. It has also extended using the Delta sharing Adapter to consume Delta tables. Delta tables: Delta tables are an improved version of Parquet files with a built-in transaction log. They behave like regular database tables, making them better for running queries. Besides accessing the files directly, you can also share and access delta tables using Delta Sharing. Please refer to the blog.

entry.title: RFFOAVIS_FPAYM payment advice print preview and spool not in custom form
entry.content:
Hello all,  when the email is generated for the payment advice, it is correct and has the custom form with our company logo, etc.   If I go to RFFOAVIS_FPAYM and do print preview or send to spool it is a blank/generic form.

What we are really looking for is a way to download a payment advice from say 6 months ago so that we can resend to the supplier or a different email.  I know that RFFOAVIS_FPAYM will resend to the email address in the supplier master but sometimes they request we send somewhere else.  We have given business access to SOST but that is only a short term solution as we don't want business to have SOST.  

FBZP > Paying Company Codes has the form set correctly.  As I said, it is working fine for the emails.

Is there something I'm missing to link the Z form to the print preview and spool? 

Thank you for any assistance.

Cheryl

entry.title: Re: Missing annotations in metadata
entry.content:
/sap/opu/odata/IWFND/CATALOGSERVICE;v=2/Annotations(TechnicalName='******',Version='0001')/$value/

your annotation has another url.

entry.title: Introducing SAP Commerce Cloud Live Sessions for Admins/Dev-Ops/IT Managers
entry.content:
Overview

Are you a System Administrator, Dev-Ops Manager, IT Project Manager or Technical Consultant working with SAP Commerce Cloud (in the Public Cloud, aka CCV2)? We’re excited to announce a series of live sessions tailored to your needs in setting up, installing, configuring, monitoring, and managing SAP Commerce Cloud servers. Each session delivers a comprehensive learning experience through a theory introduction, practical demos and interactive Q&A - ensuring you gain the skills and insights necessary for effective system management, configuration, and troubleshooting. Please note that while some sessions offer recordings for later viewing, not all sessions are recorded - so be sure to register and attend the live event if you want to participate in real-time.

Live Sessions Walk-through

Currently, we offer 5 independent live sessions as introduced below. Simply click on the direct links provided to check the upcoming schedules or available recordings:

  • Navigating the Cloud Portal in SAP Commerce Cloud (Duration: 2 hours, available from Q3 2025) - In this hands-on session, we explore the technical architecture of the SAP Commerce Cloud portal. Attendees will participate in a GUI walkthrough of key administrative tasks, equipping you with the essential skills required to manage SAP Commerce Cloud in the Public Cloud (CCV2).
  • Introducing SAP Cloud Logging (System) in SAP Commerce Cloud (Duration: 1 hour, available from Q3 2025) - Dive into SAP Cloud Logging (CLS) and discover how to efficiently access default log traces and retrieve log data. This session also covers configuring alerts to enable proactive system management and troubleshooting.
  • Introducing Consumption Credits for SAP Commerce Cloud (Duration: 1.5 hours, available from Q3 2025) - Learn all about Consumption Credits in SAP Commerce Cloud. This session reviews the Scalable Sandbox’s design for testing, demonstrates the Capacity Units Estimator with illustrative examples, and discusses best practices for usage monitoring and reporting.
  • Monitoring SAP Commerce Cloud with Dynatrace (Currently suspended; a recording is available on the live session page) - Join us for a detailed walk-through of the Dynatrace UI in this session. Learn how to monitor SAP Commerce Cloud in the Public Cloud (a.k.a. SAP Commerce Cloud Version 2 / CCV2) using the pre-bundled Application Performance Monitoring Software (APM) SAP CX Observability (Dynatrace). Gain insights from demonstrations of the essential monitoring and analysis features.
  • Exploring Data Retention Framework in SAP Commerce Cloud (Duration: 1 hour, available from Q3 2025) - This session introduces the Data Retention Framework in SAP Commerce Cloud, diving into its data structures and customization methods. You’ll learn effective procedures for configuring and implementing data retention policies tailored to meet your specific business requirements.

How to book?

  • Each session is available for independent registration, allowing you to choose based on your specific needs.
  • All live sessions are included for learners with a valid SAP Learning Hub subscription.
    • For SAP internals, you can use your SAP Learning Hub Internal Edition, just remember to activate/renew your internal edition (without cost) by clicking on the Access button on the edition portal page.

Last But Not Least

If you’d like to learn more or stay updated on our live sessions and other enablement offerings, please subscribe to the blog by clicking the “subscribe” button at the top of the page.

Thank you for reading, and happy learning!

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Data Cloud - FAQs
entry.content:
@albertosimeoni Excellent, you got it now.

That’s the key difference: BDC offers data products with a built-in catalog, storage on HDLF, while Delta tables enabled makes it possible to share data with platforms like Datasphere and Databricks.

In contrast, the standalone SAP HANA Cloud Data Lake currently does not support a Delta table catalog or external sharing with tools like Datasphere or Databricks.

entry.title: Re: SAC Adjusting for Rounding Difference
entry.content: Thanks a lot for your answer, i'll try a similar way !

entry.title: Maintenance Order - System Status released CDS
entry.content:
Hello dear community,

please, does anyone know the name of the CDS where I can find this information of a Maintenance Order?

I am looking for a released CDS view (S4H Cloud Public Edition), therefore I cannot use just a random CDS or a BAPI or a table name. It will be used in a RAP Application.

Thank you in advance,

Matus

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: SAPPhire Orlando 2025: Helping secure BMS’s supply chain and drugs with track and trace solutions
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community, My name is Aladdin Mandishah and I'm the Director of Global Customer Advisory at SAP with 15+ years of experience cross industries. In my role I advise the C-level executives on SAP Business Suite and AI solutions to drive innovation, efficiency, and compliance.

I’m excited to participate at SAP Sapphire Orlando this year, where I’ll be explaining one of the most pressing challenges in the pharmaceutical industry: Drug Counterfeit and how to secure patient lives, ensure supply chain resilience, and maintain secure operations.

My Session Overview

Helping secure BMS’s supply chain and drugs with track and trace solutions IND2349. I am presenting together with Priya Viswanathan (Bristol Myers Squibb) on 20th May 2024 at 1:00 PM - 1:40PM EDT as part of theSAP Sapphire and ASUG Pre-conference in Orlando.

 

What you will learn about

The global counterfeit drug market is estimated to reach $186 billion by 2030. threat, endangering patient lives and eroding trust in pharmaceutical supply chains. Fake or substandard medications cause hundreds of thousands of deaths annually, while regulatory bodies like the FDA, EMA, and WHO tighten serialization and traceability mandates to combat this crisis. 

In this insightful session, discover how Bristol-Myers Squibb (BMS) turned compliance into a strategic advantage, deploying  SAP Advanced track & Trace for Pharmaceuticals (SAP ATTP) and  SAP Information Collaboration Hub for Life Sciences (SAP ICH) to: 

  • Exchange serialization data in real time with global partners, closing detection gaps.
  • Automate exception handling to quarantine risks before they reach patients.

Future-proof operations against evolving regulations (DSCSA, EU FMD, etc.).

 Call to Action, Register Now

Looking forward to seeing you

Counterfeit drugs put lives and supply chains at risk, but innovative digital track-and-trace solutions are turning the tide. Join us at SAP Sapphire & ASUG Annual Conference Orlando to hear how Bristol-Myers Squibb (BMS) leverages SAP’s digital traceability technology to discover how you can replicate this success to protect patients and your operations.

Register here for our SAP Sapphire and ASUG Pre-conference  session: Helping secure BMS’s supply chain and drugs with track and trace solutions IND2349.

Save your seat today let’s build safer, smarter supply chains together!

Now let’s hear from you

When it comes to drug traceability, what's the one risk that keeps you up at night? Is it serialization gaps, partner collaboration hurdles, or staying ahead of new regulations? and looking ahead, what’s the one capability you wish your anti-counterfeit solution had by 2027? Share your biggest fear and future wish in the comment field below.

entry.title: New Enhancements from SAP Analytics Cloud for Story Reports - ToTime
entry.content:
Hello experts,

While checking the new features in the upcoming release I noticed something on the new features.

In this link, it's possible to read the following text:

Story calculations now supports new Date and Time functions:

  • ToTime(): Converts a DateTime input to a Time output.

But in a preview system, this is what we have:

I was expecting that I would be able to have only the time info on a datetime input but that's not what we have. We would need to have a string input and that's really weird.

Do you have any input when it comes to this?

Thank you so much in advance!

entry.title: Re: Different Profit Center derivation than the Cost Cent...
entry.content: Thank you very much, @erickgoulardt. My question arises because in the following link: Solucionado: Message KI339: Profit center was set to XXXXXX - SAP Community, it's mentioned that there was an SSCUI where it was possible to switch off this message. My doubt is whether this functionality was available in the past but is no longer accessible now? ? I just want to confirm that it hasn’t been replaced by another SSCUI providing the same functionality, since this feature has existed before in Public Cloud. Best regards, thank you in advance! 😉

entry.title: Re: SUM Shadow inctance on a remote application server
entry.content: The SAP  documentation says to start the SUM (Software Update Manager) on the PAS (primary application server). It's on the PAS that the SHADOW instance will run.

entry.title: Re: In the inbox, why " 'user' tagged the product" although it's just a reply?

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Logistics Private Cloud Edition FAQ & Knowledge Base Series Compilation
entry.content: Excellent Summary

entry.title: Re: MSSQL DB - Drive X 90% full - alerts
entry.content:
The official tool to manage a MSSQL Server instance is this one: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/ssms/download-sql-server-management-studio-ssms. Inside, you will find several Reports that will answer your questions.

Regarding the free space remaining on the disk, you have 2 options:

  1. ARCHIVE/DELETE data and then perform a reorganization of the DB, and/or:
  2. Extend the disk size

entry.title: Re: SimpleFioris@EWM
entry.content:

entry.title: Re: Synchronization between Plant Maintenance and Accounting Assets (Manual)
entry.content: Thank you for your prompt response, Memem. However, this isn't possible in the transaction, since type V (vehicle) can be created with an external number, meaning you can define the number you require for the vehicle. And with type M, I only have one consecutive number. That's why it's necessary to create a new vehicle.

entry.title: Re: Synchronization between Plant Maintenance and Account...
entry.content:
Thank you for your prompt response, Memem.

However, this isn't possible in the transaction, since type V (vehicle) can be created with an external number, meaning you can define the number you require for the vehicle. And with type M, I only have one consecutive number.

That's why it's necessary to create a new vehicle.

Best Regards. Aguirre

entry.title: Re: Deleting the status dependant project version
entry.content:
Hi,

Project version RELEASED is status-dependent

Message No. OV010

If a project version is status dependent, then it is not possible to delete.

entry.title: Re: Updating Telephone number for Customers' Account in SAP BYD
entry.content: @Anant: The above mentioned solution will not work, The Solution which helped me to Update the Mobile number Data using SOAP UI.

entry.title: Re: Log in as another CB user
entry.content:
Hi @ISoma ,

The authentication is controlled by your Identity Access System (IAS), not your Public Cloud tenant itself.

In your IAS, go to Applications and Resources, select your application on the left panel, then on the right hand side, under Single Sign-on, Subject Name Identifier, there is a Configuration area. Here you can choose what to use as logon name. Most times we use email. But others should work as well.

With that said, my colleague asked a good question. What scenario do you have in mind?

Regards,

George

entry.title: Re: Library view - price and item description
entry.content: That's interesting. The label should be found via its ID. Can you check the Learning version: Learning Administration > System Administration > Environment > Version?

entry.title: Re: ABAP custom code analysis using SAP Business Technology Platform
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am currently using BTP Custom Code Migration and have created a project for our ECC production system. We have been using Solution Manager to collect data for the last 6-7 years.  I have set up the project to use the usage data from solution manager, but I don't get an usage.  From what I see the FM AGS_CC_UPL_GET_LUSG_4_OBJECT in Solution Manager is called from the custom code migration application.  It looks like it is ultimately trying to get the data from  ODS Object 0SM_UPLLD ( /BI0/ASM_UPLLD00 ) . Currently there are no records in this table.  Any idea what could be missing?  When using the Solution Manager Cust Code Management I can see "Last Used" data.  

Thanks .

entry.title: Assignment Profile Update - triggered notification to whom?
entry.content:
Hello Team,
Hope you're doing well.

Currently I have one AP that excludes one specific Group Company. In the near future, this Group Company will be added to the AP (so won't be any more an exclusion). My question is the following: If I remove 'Company Z' from the Group Company exception and execute the AP again, who will get the assignment notification and the re-assignment? Only 'Company Z' users or all employees who are part of the AP?

I want to inform only 'Company Z' users, not all users who is part of the AP.

Thanks in advance,
Best Regards,
Sofia

entry.title: Delete 'Exam Objects (Legacy)'
entry.content:
Hello Team,
Hope you're doing well.


I'm working on a clean-up of 'Exam Objects (Legacy)', however, for some of them I receive the message '... cannot be removed because it is in use', and I checked and the legacy exam is linked to already completed items, hence item revision won't work.

Do you have any idea how I can delete or inactivate these legacy exams associated to items/previous completions?

If it's not possible to delete them (because they were used in the past?) is there some way to at least inactivate them? Or edit the title so I can add a 'Do not use' in the Legacy Exam Title?

Thanks a lot in advance!
Kind Regards,
Sofia

entry.title: Re: MODIFICATION OF THE VALUATION CLASS IN PRODUCT MASTER...
entry.content:
Hi Ismael,

 

Please follow the FAQ Question I'm unable to change the valuation class for a material. How can I fix this issue? which is relevant to S/4HANA Cloud .

"If you have open purchase orders or delivery schedule lines, you will get message "Purchase orders already exist.". You can find related purchase orders after you click 'Display Error' button. All the PO items which don't have deletion flag will be regarded as open PO though they have already been completed and invoiced. Since the status can be easily reversed back, the system only allows valuation class change if PO is deleted.

Select all PO items for the related material and delete them using the app Manage Purchase Orders "

 

Please delete the purchase order items as shown in your screenshot. wether the order is invoiced is not considered , only the deletion indicator

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: Community Member Spotlight: Marssel Vilaça - April 2025 Edition
entry.content:
Thanks, @Marssel700 for the awesome job you have been doing to the Brazilian community SAP - creating incredible events, like SAP Inside Track - together @RobertaFernande - bringing new and fresh contents to SAP consultants learning other SAP things, some of them so far from our day by day.
For me, it is such a pleasure be at SAP Inside Tracks, learning something new and talk to my colleagues about SAP and business.

Please keep helping Brazilian SAP community.

entry.title: Re: SAP Public Cloud - Maintain multiple delivery address...
entry.content:
There are no apps available currently in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. The alternative would be to use BAdI.

Regards

Jai Srinivasan

entry.title: Remove a profit center in T.code GR55
entry.content:
Dear Friends,

In the GR55, User wants to remove a profit center, which the user informs us it is non-exist and does not want in the report.

Please suggest, how to resolve the issue.

Regards

Sridhar

entry.title: How To USE QAC2?
entry.content:
Hi Team.

I am new to SAP and I need to transfer inventory from one Storage Location to another while it's under a "Quality Inspection" designation. I have been looking into Transaction [QAC2]. This looks like it might be exactly what I need, but I can't for the life of me figure out how to use it, and there are no tutorials online for this transaction. 

Example: SKU: "APPLE" Lot/Batch#: "D1" [currently under Quality inspection] ______________________ Plant [01]_Storage location [A]      >> To >>      Plant [01]_Storage location [B]. 

[Screenshot below] I have tried to change the locations in RED but the system won't let me and I am able to change the location in YELLOW but i get the error message "Material 4197908 US03 P3C3 does not exist". Please can someone make a tutorial or walk me through this transaction? 🙂

entry.title: Re: Scope Item 5W2 and Intercompany Scope Items like 1WO
entry.content: 5W2 = Group Valuation, 1WO = Extended Intercompany Processes for Sales

entry.title: Re: SAP CHOTA TALKS HYDERABAD 2025 (Q2) - Hyderabad Coming Soon
entry.content:
Thank you for the kind words! @lauraschmitz , 

Community collaboration & deep engagement is exactly what makes these events special. The "from the community, for the community" approach ensures we create something that truly resonates with everyone's needs and interests.

We're excited to gather diverse perspectives and fresh ideas that will shape this into an exceptional experience for all participants. The response so far has been inspiring, and we can't wait to incorporate the valuable feedback.

Special thanks to the entire organizing team has been working diligently behind the scenes to build a strong foundation.

Everyone participation is what transforms a good event into a great one!

entry.title: Re: SAP Ariba REST APIs: Gain a comprehensive understanding of rate limits!
entry.content:
This is a great blog!  Does one API's rate limit influence others (eg. within the same Ariba Realm?)  What about between the different categories listed (below)?  For context, we'd seen issues with rate limit errors even with a built-in delay on a given API, so we are trying to understand if there is a bigger co-dependencies to rate limits.  Can this be clarified?

SAP Ariba categorizes its API endpoints into different groups, such as Authentication, Master Data, Transactions and Reporting. Each category may have its rate limits, which can vary based on the API endpoint's complexity and resource requirements.

entry.title: Re: S4 Conversion - ABAP tools to be used ADT( Eclipse )...
entry.content: bas has nothing to do with abap

entry.title: Re: OAuth2SAMLBearerAssertion Flow with SAP BTP Destination Service. SuccessFactors.
entry.content:
If I am using SystemUser , I am able to receive Bearer Token and With Bearer Token , able to call api . 

But I show document which says SystemUser property is depcreated . If I am not using this , I am getting this error.

    "authTokens": [
        {
            "type": "",
            "value": "",
            "error": "Retrieval of OAuthToken failed due to: Cannot determine user to propagate for OAuth2SAMLBearerAssertion destination. Either provide user_token JWT token (https://docs.cloudfoundry.org/api/uaa/version/4.7.1/index.html#user-token-grant) when retrieving the destination or configure it with SystemUser.",
            "expires_in": "0"
        }
    ]
}]

What extra property I need to add in destination instead of this ?
I am using this destination in custom app where may be possible all users which have app access may not have success factor access.

entry.title: My new UDO does not appear in UDO's list in a UDF with Link to UDO Validation
entry.content:
Hi,

I've already created and used several UDO's and all work fine.

Now, I created a new UDO and it doesn't appear to choose from the Link to UDO list in UDF Validation.

My steps where:

1. Create UDT of type Document

2. Create UDF's for the UDT

3. Create UDO from UDT

Now it appears in the UDO's list in the Object Registration Wizard

4. Create a UDF in the Production Order - Head

4.a. Choose Link to Entity in the Validation,

4.b. Choose Link to UDO

All the other UDO's I created before appear on the list of UDO's, but not the one I created now.

 

I already reviewed the Object Registration, and everything is Ok. I don't know if it makes any difference, but I choose not to create a Form, cause I'll use my own.

I don't know what to do, can anyone help?

 

Regards,

Arão

SAP Business One

SAP Business One Extensibility

entry.title: Hi, can I directly access dynamicconfiguration variable inside Integrated Configuration?
entry.content:
Here is my PI solution. 
1. it's a pass through PI solution (REST Adapter) for GET and POST calls. No ESR. 
2. We deliver a TPZ file to customers. No separate adapter module deployment. 
3. In our GET calls, we pass a bunch of HTTP Headers. 

One challenge we had with our customers is that some customers require HTTP Header Content-Type and some don't in GET/DELETE calls. In CI, there's automatic forwarding of HTTP headers from source to target. 
In PI, I understand that I have to list out all the HTTP Headers that I want to pass to downstream system. This means that Content-Type will always be on the header to downstream system regardless if it's provided by sender or not. 
The workaround we came up with is 2 receiver communication channels. 1 with Content-Type and 1 without Content-Type. We currently also have 2 sender communication channels. We would like to set a condition inside Integrated Configuration to determine the appropriate receiver communication channel based on the presence of Content-Type. I made it work with ContextObject HEADER.ID2 by passing the HTTP Header Content-Type to it.  

What we would like is NOT to use HEADER.ID2, but our own variable from DynamicConfiguration. 
In my below screenshot, we have tau_header_content_type and header_content_type. Can I use one of these directly in XPath?

I tried
/DynamicConfiguration/sap:Record[@name='tau_header_content_type']
/DynamicConfiguration/tau_header_content_type
and a bunch of other variations, but they all give me an error.

entry.title: Re: Different Profit Center derivation than the Cost Cent...
entry.content: Hi Jose,

entry.title: Re: Different Profit Center derivation than the Cost Cent...
entry.content: I have checked the Configuration Activity List and it seems isn't available, (it's deprecated). You're correct. If there is an other configuration to fulfill the old one, it's out of my scope, I suggest you to follow the process which I've indicated in my first reply! Thanks for the update.

entry.title: Re: How To USE QAC2?
entry.content:
Hi,

 It looks like the material 4197908 does not in plant US03 and Storage location P3C3. You might want to extend the material to the plant/storage location and then execute this transfer step.

Regards

Jai Srinivasan

entry.title: Business transformation management at Sapphire: What you will learn
entry.content:
Business transformation management will be front and center at Sapphire in both Orlando and Madrid, from the main stage as well as across multiple sessions dedicated to SAP LeanIX, SAP Signavio, and WalkMe. 

The theme tying all these various sessions together is this: To transform, companies must establish a transformation capability on a foundation of business process transformation, enterprise architecture, and digital adoption. 

The reason it makes sense to think about transformation from a capability perspective boils down to one simple fact: the need to transform remains constant. What’s more, no transformation is ever a one-and-done project. Instead, it’s an ongoing journey requiring continuous insight, adaptation, and iteration. 

Here’s a breakdown of how we will cover the ins and outs of business transformation management at Sapphire. 

BTM Session #1: Built for the future: How to develop a transformation capability 

The first session you will want to check out is this one from Signavio’s Gero Decker. He’ll describe how AI-powered business transformation management solutions optimize processes, simplify IT, and drive digital adoption. Along the way, he’ll also show you how to turn change into a competitive edge and enable smarter decisions, better foresight, and continuous excellence. 

Add this session to your agenda: Orlando | Madrid 

BTM Session #2: AI agent governance: Your system of record to boost visibility and impact 

In this session, LeanIX’s André Christ will explain why it's essential to establish and maintain visibility across all the AI agents you deploy and how to create an AI agent system of record with SAP LeanIX solutions. AI is one of the main drivers of transformation today and creating a system of record for agents helps ensure they deliver maximum impact within a sustainable governance framework.  

Add this session to your agenda: Orlando | Madrid 

BTM Session #3: Deliver a people-first digital transformation with WalkMe 

WalkMe’s Dan Adika will lead this session focused on digital adoption: where the rubber hits the road when it comes to executing transformation initiatives. You will learn how WalkMe empowers employees, speeds up proficiency, and delivers massive ROI for many of the world's leading enterprises by ensuring that your workforce knows how to make the best use of the technologies and processes you adopt. 

Add this session to your agenda: Orlando | Madrid​ 

BTM Session #4: The transformation cheat code: How to develop a foundation for success 

Finally, in this panel discussion you will hear from a panel of your peers how they’ve developed a transformation capability with SAP LeanIX, SAP Signavio and WalkMe. The conversation will reveal both the transformation challenges the participating companies have faced and how they are overcoming them with this set of solutions.   

Add this session to your agenda: Orlando | Madrid 

Want to learn more? 

As I said at the top, there will be sessions taking you on a deep dive of solutions from SAP Signavio, SAP LeanIX, and WalkMe. 

There will also be Demo Stations allowing you to see these solutions in action.  

Of course, if you would like to set up a one on one with one of our solution experts, you can do that drop in for a discussion or schedule a meeting at the welcome desk in the Expert Center.  

See you at Sapphire! 

Image: Timo Elliot/Creative Commons

entry.title: Re: Exciting Update: SAP SuccessFactors Customer Training Courses are Moving to learning.sap.com!
entry.content: Great blog. Can you share the Spanish version link?

entry.title: Re: Duplicate records in masterdata-workaround in BPC?
entry.content: Hi, I do not see any link available.

entry.title: Re: USMM2 measurment 1160 fails with error You are not au...
entry.content:
You may already have the answer, but wanted to add it for future people. There is an SAP Note for this error:

3435294 - SAP Invoice Management by OpenText - USMM license measurement - SAP licenses count stopped - SAP for Me

entry.title: Master Data duplicate errors in BPC 10.1 Standar
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts,

I would need help in resolving the below issue, Master Data Failures in BPC.

Detected duplicate member ID '62370A1_GDD'

and 

Dimension member 3883_#1 BTM is an invalid member ID in dimension 

 

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Intercompany Withholding taxes
entry.content: OP did you find the answer? I am very curious as well.

entry.title: Re: SAP Meetup New York City May 2025 - Meet the champion!
entry.content: Can’t wait to be there!

entry.title: Re: Master Data duplicate errors in BPC 10.1 Standar
entry.content:
Hi,

Detected duplicate member ID '62370A1_GDD':
- BPC models are built on top of BW InfoProviders and each dimension in BPC maps to a BW InfoObject and its members are managed in the BW master data tables...
- Via SE16 or RSA1 check the InfoObject master data and clean the duplicate in the source file or table.
- Run RSDMD if manually changes.

Dimension member 3883_#1 BTM is an invalid member ID in dimension:
- Member ID violates naming rules that are enforced by BW/BPC.
- Could be the "#", starting with number (InfoObject doesn't allow), max character length (20 as default).

If you have any questions, please provide more information.

entry.title: SAP Language Pack
entry.content: We are considering to implement SuccessFactors in multiple languages. If we opt to add 5 languages in the system, do I have to provide translation for each standard field or the I just need to enable the language pack in the system and it will automatically translate the standard fields.

entry.title: UK digital tax submission in ByD (VAT)
entry.content:
HI Team,

As the UK has a VAT group, various companies are consolidated into one single VAT return. Currently we submit each company separately through ByD. Is this the correct process, or should there be a step where we can consolidate?”


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: UK digital tax submission in ByD (VAT)
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

In SAP Business ByDesign, the native functionality to consolidate VAT returns at the group level is not available at the moment. It is currently expected to submit each company separately. For more details, please refer to the Help Documents Below:

Tax Reporting Group
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_BYDESIGN/2754875d2d2a403f95e58a41a9c7d6de/9c1caba110e2408e99aec742b7965057.html?locale=en-US
Tax Reporting – UK
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_BYDESIGN/2754875d2d2a403f95e58a41a9c7d6de/b8e09695cc7d48de94e3ae2f7ba85180.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: While creating a sales order I am getting an error as " Error in commitment update. Status being set
entry.content:
While creating a sales order in va01 I am getting an error as " Error in commitment update. Status being set. The order can not be delivered/billed."

Please help me out.

entry.title: Learning Path for SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Embarking on your SAP Cloud ALM learning journey? We've gathered a collection of invaluable resources to assist you in deepening your understanding and skills in Application Lifecycle Management (ALM). Below, you'll find links to recorded sessions, upcoming webinars, product information, onboarding guides, training materials, and more to support your exploration of SAP Cloud ALM.

Recorded Webinars and Upcoming Sessions

Dive into our recorded webinar sessions that offer thorough insights into SAP Cloud ALM. These sessions, available in both Spanish and Portuguese, are an excellent starting point:

  • SAP Cloud ALM Webinars Recordings – Spanish and Portuguese.

Stay informed with future webinars scheduled for Q2 2025, offering updated perspectives:

  • SAP Cloud ALM Q2 2025 Portuguese & Spanish Webinar Sessions.

Product Information

Enhance your understanding of SAP Cloud ALM through comprehensive product information:

  • SAP Cloud ALM Overview
  • SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation
  • SAP Cloud ALM for Operations
  • SAP Cloud ALM for Service

Onboarding Resources

For seamless onboarding and setup, explore these guides:

  • Requesting SAP Cloud ALM
  • Setting Up SAP Cloud ALM
  • Setup Managed Components
  • Getting Started with SAP Cloud ALM

Stay Updated

Remain current with the latest developments and community engagements:

  • Events
  • Newsletter
  • Community

Additional Information

Further enrich your knowledge with additional resources:

  • Documentation
  • Supported Solutions
  • What’s New Information
  • SAP Cloud ALM Usage Rights
  • Product Road Map

Training Resources

Enhance your expertise with curated learning journeys and training tools:

  • Learning Journey: SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation
  • Learning Journey: SAP Cloud ALM for Operations
  • Expert Guided Implementation Service (Register)
  • Mission “Onboarding and First Steps” (Start)
  • ALM Webinars Recordings – Spanish and Portuguese
  • ALM Summit EMEA 2024 – Replays

Experience SAP Cloud ALM

Access our SAP Cloud ALM Demo System, a public demonstration environment where you can explore SAP Cloud ALM with provided data at no cost. Get started immediately and immerse yourself in this dynamic platform.

We hope these resources serve you well in your learning journey with SAP Cloud ALM. Happy exploring!

entry.title: Re: Rehire with SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding: From Exit to Re-entry
entry.content:
Hello,

We recently started experiencing an issue where when we intiate Onboarding and then complete the first verification it's essentially auto-hiring them into EC (bypassing the need for ONB and MPH) and it's putting the into "limbo" where they are sort of half active half inactive. Any idea why we might be having this issue? I have a ticket open with SAP support, but wanted to comment here as well just in case.

Thank you!

entry.title: Adaptation Project for Custom Fiori element application
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have created an adaptation project for a custom Fiori Elements application using BAS. The deployment was successful using the deploy wizard in BAS. I am able to find the original Fiori Elements application in the SAP system under transaction SE80 as a BSP application.

However, I am unable to locate the adaptation project under BSP applications in SE80.

I would like to understand the following:

  1. After deployment, where can I find adaptation projects in the SAP system?

  2. Under what name and structure are these adaptation projects stored?

  3. How can I determine the URL of the deployed adaptation project? I need to connect adaptation project with non-sap launchpad using URL.

 

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: SAP Digital Manufacturing 25.05 Release enhancements and new capabilities
entry.content:
* Subject to change
* This blog post is Work In Progress and will be constantly updated in the upcoming days during the release cycle, so make sure you come back often to check the updates. 🙂
 
Do you like this content? Please live a Kudos!

📣SAP Digital Manufacturing 25.05 Release is coming out in Quality spaces on 3rd of May, and in Productive spaces on 18th of May. 🔥

See my personal highlights below:

✨Introduction of the ‘Panel’ concept in the Manage Materials app, first wave of a staged development
⏱️ Manage Time Tracking app is now deprecated — say hello to the new Manage Time Records app and several other Time Tracking enhancements
🧩 Custom POD Plugins deployed directly in POD Designer are now usable in the Design Production Processes app
🔐Enhanced Role Templates, and overall Access Management capabilities
🔗Updates to Collaboration Directives and Links for Integration Workflows
🛠️ Create DMir Issues directly from PODs using Custom Plugins
📋Review by Exception is now available in Order POD
🛠️ Routing and BOM Upversioning on specific change conditions
🌍Time Zone Settings are now supported for Timers in Manage Automatic Triggers
🎯Introduction of REO Resource Prioritization in the Manage Scheduling Profile app
🧪 Early adopter feature: REO Scheduling of Process Orders with basic scope
🔄Continuous improvements in REO SFC-Based Scheduling at the Resource Level
📊REO Tiles and Apps have been reorganized for better navigation
🔍New sorting option by Scheduled Start of Orders in Order POD
❌Buyoff Rejection Enhancements: SFC quantity and status now go back In Queue upon rejection
🕒Multiple enhancements in Shifts and Labor Planning
📥Improvements in Production Processes Export/Import flows
🔗Introduction of many new Public APIs and Endpoints
🔣Support for Special Characters in Design Production Processes app
⚙️Zero Downtime Support for Production Process Design deployment during Quick Deploy
🧪 Quality Inspection enhancements for Inspection Point scenarios
📌Prioritize selected SFCs in Work Lists, keeping them always on top
⚖️Support for Parallel Units of Measure in confirmations
🖨️ Support for Adobe Forms ZPL in Manage Document Print Templates
🔁Support for Multiple Entry Points and Parallel Sequences in Routings
📨New Message Failed Event in Manage Automatic Triggers, triggered upon integration failures
🔢New prefix/suffix parameters: {TWODIGIT_WEEKOFYEAR} and {ISO_TWODIGIT_WEEKOFYEAR} for smart numbering patterns
🔁Production Change enhancements including Activity Confirmation copy
🏷️ SFC Relabel Events now included in OEE calculations
🌐SAP DM for Issue Resolution now available in the US20 region
🖥️ Several Edge Enhancements and fresh capabilities
🌍SAP Help Portal and Documentation now available in 39 additional languages

And much more! See What´s New for more details.

 
* Subject to change
* This blog post is Work In Progress and will be constantly updated in the upcoming days during the release cycle, so make sure you come back often to check the updates. 🙂
 
Do you like this content? Please live a Kudos!
If you have any questions, please check SAP Community Q&A Area, or comment down below.

Thanks,
Manoel Costa

entry.title: Re: Transactionsode: SOST automatically
entry.content:
Dear peterrstoll,

normally, when emails were not be able to send to the receiver, the most often seen origins were:

1. The message passed SAP, but stucked between SAP and email exchange server or

2. The message has internal error within SAP and were not handovered to exchange server.

For the first one, you normally get standard email notification by your email provider / server. Here is the problem, that in SAP everything looks good and you are not independent from notifications.

For the second you can catch up the failed messages via table SOST by using a custom programm and send them by mail, excel whatever. Or better, you use SAP WF and catch up such message types with errors and put them into workflow task to track and solve them.

Hope this helps.

Best regards

Dennis

entry.title: Re: Supplier Inovice line item split for two VAT codes
entry.content:
Hi,

Do i understand it right that you have 1 custom price condition (planned cost) and for this price condition you want to have two tax codes?

As far as I know it is not possible (but need to check it just to be sure) and what if this price condition would be entered twice? and than for the same custom price you would have 2 line items in MIRO. 

Regards

Dariusz Kalmarczyk

entry.title: Need information on the Composable Storefront
entry.content:
Hello team,

We would like to have information on Composable Storefront. Could you please share the documentation associated with it (i.e. What is it? How to Use it?)?

Thanks in advance.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Need information on the Composable Storefront
entry.content:
To gather more information regarding Composable Storefront, you can explore our documentation on the topic. Below, you'll find some helpful resources that explain what it is, how to use it, and how to get started with its libraries:

  • About Composable Storefront
  • Using the Composable Storefront
  • Getting Started With Composable Storefront Libraries

Additionally, if you would like to know more about the Composable Storefront, you can search directly on 'SAP Commerce Cloud, composable storefront'.

Regards,
Izadora
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: RFFOAVIS_FPAYM payment advice print preview and spool...
entry.content:
RFFOAVIS_FPAYM doesn't inherently respect the FBZP configuration for the form when executed standalone and uses the defaults to the standard form (F110_AVIS) unless there is a variant that explicitly sets to the Z-form or the program is enchanced or copied to force the Z-form.
You need to check if your system setup have archiving/output history enabled. If disabled, the way is re-fetching the payment dat and re-redering the form.

I recommend that:
Create a variant for RFFOAVIS_FPAYM them you references the corrct payment method/company code/form.
Ensures that your custom form is picked up during preview/spool.
You need to make sure that the variant explicitly overrides default with your Z-form name in the selection screen (if visible).

Or:
Create a custom Z-repor for Payment Advice Reprint
This works for better long-term.
The report need to accepts payment document number(s) and fetches historical payment data. Calls your Z-form via Smart Forms / Adobe Form

entry.title: Re: Part 1: SAP Cloud Platform Integration for Data Services (CPI-DS)
entry.content:
Hi @Geetha_Madhuri_Bobbili 

Great blog! I was hoping to get more clarification of types of DataStores. 


What would be the difference between SAP HANA Application Cloud vs SAP HANA business suite application vs Database (HANA)? In which scenarios would you chose either of them?

entry.title: Re: Materials to learn SAP Cloud Indentity Services, IAS,...
entry.content:
This is the best one I've found about IAS: https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/cloud-identity-services/identity-authentication

I hope it helps 🙂

entry.title: Re: While creating a sales order I am getting an error as...
entry.content:
Hello,

Since some basic technical and functional details weren't provided, I’ll assume a few possibilities and share questions and directions that might help guide the investigation of the issue:

Funds Management (FM) is active in your system?
Commitment Management is active in your system?
Account assignment objects (e.g., cost center, internal order) valid and active?
There’s sufficient budget available for the assigned fund and commitment item?
Run FMRP_RW_BUDCON to analyze the budget?
Commitment item being correctly derived in FMDERIVE?
The necessary fields (fund, commitment item, fund center) properly derived in FMDERIVE ?
Validate the derivation rules, FMDERIVE or the BAdI FM_COM_ITEM_DERIVE ?
The FM area is correctly assigned in the sales order master data?
Configured to assign a CO object (e.g., cost center, internal order) to the sales order?
Using CO-PA? KE4W, KE4I active and correct?
VOV7 marked as relevant for CO posting?
OKC9 to confirm the correct integration of SD to CO?

entry.title: Re: SAP CHOTA TALKS Q1 - HYDERABAD - JUST THE BEGINNING!!
entry.content: https://community.sap.com/t5/hyderabad-blog-posts/sap-chota-talks-hyderabad-2025-q2-hyderabad-coming-soon/ba-p/14089945?emcs_t=S2h8ZW1haWx8dG9waWNfc3Vic2NyaXB0aW9ufE1BM0VUWExGUk5KSkRHfDE0MDg5OTQ1fFNVQlNDUklQVElPTlN8aEs

entry.title: Re: How To USE QAC2?
entry.content:
Thank you for commenting, Jai.

Can you please go into more detail about this "Extend" process you mentioned?
